resources.description: Advanced damage calculator for working out spreads against multiple Pokémon at once.

resources.description: Usage stats, movesets, and common teammates across the current metagame.

resources.name: StatCrusher
resources.description: Battle records and usage broken down by Elo tier, format (Bo1/Bo3), and season.

resources.name: MunchStats
resources.description: VGC usage statistics and metagame data.

resources.description: Searchable database of VGC replays.

resources.name: ARC VGC
resources.description: Analytics platform built on all public Showdown replays — browse aggregated data and metagame insights.

resources.name: Pokédata
resources.description: Standings tracking, player history, and team comparison tools across formats.

resources.name: Nimbasa City Post
resources.description: VGC news and metagame/data analysis.

resources.name: VGC Matchup Lab
resources.description: Restricted (mega/legendary) matchup table paired with usage statistics.

resources.name: Limitless
resources.description: Online tournament hosting with brackets and live standings.

resources.name: RK9
resources.description: Official event registration, pairings, and standings.

resources.name: Reportworm Standings
resources.description: Live tournament standings tracker.

resources.name: Cut Explorer
resources.description: Predicts and analyzes whether a given record makes Day 2 cut.

resources.name: NA CP Leaderboard
resources.description: Live leaderboard for North America Championship Point standings.

resources.name: Victory Road
resources.description: VGC rules, schedules, Championship Point tracking, and guides.

resources.name: Pokémon Events
resources.description: Official Play! Pokémon event locator.

resources.name: VGC Pastes
resources.description: Large community archive of tournament team pastes.

resources.name: PASRS
resources.description: Palkia Academy Showdown Reporting Spreadsheet — log replays and track game-by-game, matchup, and move stats.
resources.note: Your data stays in your own Google Drive.

resources.name: SPAMS
resources.description: Sableye's Planning and Analysis of Matchups Spreadsheet — build gameplans and matchup summaries you fully own.
resources.note: Your data stays in your own Google Drive.

resources.name: teamsheet.gg
resources.description: Build and format official-style team sheets.

resources.name: Team List Creator
resources.description: Generates printable tournament team lists.

resources.name: Marriland Team Builder
resources.description: Check a team's defensive weakness/resistance spread and offensive coverage.

resources.name: VGC Guide
resources.description: Older but still-valuable text guides on strategy, teambuilding, catching/breeding, and circuit info.

resources.name: Serebii
resources.description: Pokémon news plus a complete Pokédex, move, and item database.

resources.name: PokémonDB
resources.description: Clean Pokédex, movesets, type charts, and breeding/data reference.

resources.description: Team paste hosting used for importing teams.
